pull_request.title: Bump org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17 from 8.72.6 to 8.72.8
pull_request.body:
Bumps [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) from 8.72.6 to 8.72.8.
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17's releases.

8.72.8

What's Changed

  • Fix StackOverflowError in Validated.Both and redundant validation traversal by @​pstreef in openrewrite/rewrite#6690
  • Changing npx to npx.cmd on Windows, normalizing paths for source file processing and fixing spawn and spawnSync on Windows. by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite#6662
  • Mark parent tag in DependencyInsight when dependency is inherited by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6693
  • Clean up the error message when a recipe cannot be found in the marketplace by @​shanman190 in openrewrite/rewrite#6688

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.72.7...v8.72.8

8.72.7

What's Changed

  • RPC - Remove mention of JavaScript for Python RPC server error message by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6673
  • Skip BOM download when version contains unresolved placeholders by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6674
  • Support multi-component literal dependency declarations by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6669
  • Improving AddCommentToImport when it comes to comments that get added at the beginning of the file by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite#6675
  • Fix DeleteProperty losing newlines when deleting entries with block scalars by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6670
  • Python: Add RPC infrastructure for calling Java recipes by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6677
  • Python: Add pip bootstrap support for openrewrite package by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6679
  • Python: Add data table support for recipes by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6680
  • Add Gradle FindRepositoryOrder recipe by @​kmccarp in openrewrite/rewrite#6676
  • Python: Add context-insensitive templating mechanism by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6681
  • Fix test for newer plugin versions by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6685
  • Catch Throwable instead of Exception in KotlinParser and PythonParser by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6633

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.72.6...v8.72.7

Commits
  • 0e021e8 Clean up the error message when a recipe cannot be found in the marketplace (...
  • 9fe1fb5 Mark parent tag in DependencyInsight when dependency is inherited (#6693)
  • 8315c06 Changing npx to npx.cmd on Windows, normalizing paths for source file pro...
  • 1790f4e Fix StackOverflowError in Validated.Both.iterator() and redundant validation ...
  • 75e9711 Catch Throwable instead of Exception in KotlinParser and PythonParser (#6633)
  • ac001a4 Fix test for newer plugin versions (#6685)
  • 7546770 Python: Add context-insensitive templating mechanism (#6681)
  • dc11f7a Add Gradle FindRepositoryOrder recipe (#6676)
  • ff9d914 Python: Add data table support for recipes (#6680)
  • acee7fb Python: Add pip bootstrap support for openrewrite package (#6679)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view
